markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call to explore GrowthX's AI-driven content creation service for Highspot.](https://fathom.video/share/e8EukMy5xBanwtqui59Ep5Yw7kg7NDu1?tab=summary&timestamp=58.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Highspot's Goal:** Replace their piecemeal content process (using Profound) with a single, cohesive engine that blends AI for speed with human expertise for quality.](https://fathom.video/share/e8EukMy5xBanwtqui59Ep5Yw7kg7NDu1?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Offer:** An end-to-end service delivering 5 articles/week for $15-18k/mo, following a mandatory 8-week, $30-40k strategy sprint to align on quality.](https://fathom.video/share/e8EukMy5xBanwtqui59Ep5Yw7kg7NDu1?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [**Key Concern:** GrowthX's internal scoring system is opaque, lacking the direct competitor comparison and user-facing visibility that Highspot values in their current tool, Profound.](https://fathom.video/share/e8EukMy5xBanwtqui59Ep5Yw7kg7NDu1?tab=summary&timestamp=1781.0)
  - [**Next Step:** A follow-up call with GrowthX's CEO, Marcel, to provide a deep technical dive on their scoring methodology and LLM orchestration.](https://fathom.video/share/e8EukMy5xBanwtqui59Ep5Yw7kg7NDu1?tab=summary&timestamp=1958.0)

## Topics

### Highspot's Content Challenges

  - [**Current Process:** A piecemeal workflow using Profound for AI recommendations, requiring manual handoffs and assembly.](https://fathom.video/share/e8EukMy5xBanwtqui59Ep5Yw7kg7NDu1?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [**Team Focus:**](https://fathom.video/share/e8EukMy5xBanwtqui59Ep5Yw7kg7NDu1?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
      - [**SEO (Claire):** SEO-driven blogs and landing page optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/e8EukMy5xBanwtqui59Ep5Yw7kg7NDu1?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
      - [**Content Marketing (Pam):** Global thought leadership (campaigns, ebooks, articles).](https://fathom.video/share/e8EukMy5xBanwtqui59Ep5Yw7kg7NDu1?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [**Primary Need:** A single, integrated engine for faster, higher-quality content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/e8EukMy5xBanwtqui59Ep5Yw7kg7NDu1?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)

### GrowthX's Proposed Solution

  - [**Service Model:** An end-to-end partner handling strategy, execution, and CMS publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/e8EukMy5xBanwtqui59Ep5Yw7kg7NDu1?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
  - [**Engagement Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/e8EukMy5xBanwtqui59Ep5Yw7kg7NDu1?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [**Phase 1: Strategy Sprint (8 weeks, $30-40k)**](https://fathom.video/share/e8EukMy5xBanwtqui59Ep5Yw7kg7NDu1?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
          - [**Goal:** Align on quality and build a content roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/e8EukMy5xBanwtqui59Ep5Yw7kg7NDu1?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
          - [**Output:** 5-10 published articles.](https://fathom.video/share/e8EukMy5xBanwtqui59Ep5Yw7kg7NDu1?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
          - [**Decision Point:** Highspot can opt out after this phase.](https://fathom.video/share/e8EukMy5xBanwtqui59Ep5Yw7kg7NDu1?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [**Phase 2: Growth Execution (12+ months, $15-18k/mo)**](https://fathom.video/share/e8EukMy5xBanwtqui59Ep5Yw7kg7NDu1?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
          - [**Output:** 5 articles/week (1,500–2,500 words each).](https://fathom.video/share/e8EukMy5xBanwtqui59Ep5Yw7kg7NDu1?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
  - [**Team Model:** A dedicated team (Managing Director, Managing Editor, Content Manager) with deep SEO/content backgrounds.](https://fathom.video/share/e8EukMy5xBanwtqui59Ep5Yw7kg7NDu1?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)

### GrowthX's Platform & Workflows

  - [**Platform:** A proprietary internal tool used by GrowthX's team, not a client-facing SaaS product.](https://fathom.video/share/e8EukMy5xBanwtqui59Ep5Yw7kg7NDu1?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [**Workflow Inputs:** "Artifacts" (e.g., ICP personas, brand guidelines) that provide context for the AI.](https://fathom.video/share/e8EukMy5xBanwtqui59Ep5Yw7kg7NDu1?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
  - [**LLM Orchestration:** Uses a mix of models (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini) and specialized research tools (Perplexity, Exa, Tavli).](https://fathom.video/share/e8EukMy5xBanwtqui59Ep5Yw7kg7NDu1?tab=summary&timestamp=1218.0)
  - [**Core Workflow Loop:**](https://fathom.video/share/e8EukMy5xBanwtqui59Ep5Yw7kg7NDu1?tab=summary&timestamp=1442.0)
    1.  [**Brief Generation:** AI analyzes keywords, competitors, and intent to create a robust brief.](https://fathom.video/share/e8EukMy5xBanwtqui59Ep5Yw7kg7NDu1?tab=summary&timestamp=1442.0)
    2.  [**Agentic Research:** Workflows run in a loop, scoring outputs and refining research until criteria are met.](https://fathom.video/share/e8EukMy5xBanwtqui59Ep5Yw7kg7NDu1?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)
  - [**Client Collaboration:** Feedback is currently handled via Google Docs and Slack. A client-facing portal is planned for Q1 2025.](https://fathom.video/share/e8EukMy5xBanwtqui59Ep5Yw7kg7NDu1?tab=summary&timestamp=1710.0)

### Key Concern: Scoring & Visibility

  - [**Highspot's Requirement:** A transparent, user-facing scoring system with direct competitor comparison, similar to Profound.](https://fathom.video/share/e8EukMy5xBanwtqui59Ep5Yw7kg7NDu1?tab=summary&timestamp=1781.0)
  - [**GrowthX's System:** Internal-only scoring for quality and groundedness, with no direct competitor comparison feature for clients.](https://fathom.video/share/e8EukMy5xBanwtqui59Ep5Yw7kg7NDu1?tab=summary&timestamp=1586.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Highspot needs this visibility to validate content performance and justify the investment.](https://fathom.video/share/e8EukMy5xBanwtqui59Ep5Yw7kg7NDu1?tab=summary&timestamp=1781.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler (GrowthX):** Schedule a follow-up call with CEO Marcel for a deep dive on the platform's scoring methodology and LLM orchestration.](https://fathom.video/share/e8EukMy5xBanwtqui59Ep5Yw7kg7NDu1?tab=summary&timestamp=1958.0)
